GrowData.description: Maximum HP increases by 10 per rank.
Maximum MP increases by 10 per rank.
Maximum LP increases by 5 per rank.
Attack power increases by 5 per rank.
Defense increases by 5 per rank.
Speed increases by 5 per rank.
Maximum damage increases by 2 per rank.
Skill "Aura Blitz" turns into "Force Blitz".
Skill "Aura Field" turns into "Aegis Field".
Skill "Aura Break" turns into "Force Break".
Skill "Twin Action" turns into "Cross Action".
Learn passive skill "Iron Will". <CR>Effect: Chance to avoid KO. Reduces status ailment turns.
Learn passive skill "Capable Alchemist". <CR>Effect: Increases item power.
Learn passive skill "Top Gourmet". <CR>Effect: Increases attack power. Increases base damage.
Learn passive skill "Bonds of Childhood Friends". <CR>Effect: Greatly increases stats when Monika or Oskar have low HP.
Learn passive skill "Critical Enhance". <CR>Effect: Increases damage of critical hits.
Learn passive skill "Critical Rate Up". <CR>Effect: Increases critical hit chance.
Learn passive skill "Damage Reduction". <CR>Effect: Reduces all damage taken.
Learn passive skill "Skill Enhance". <CR>Effect: Increases skill power.
Learn passive skill "Break Resistance". <CR>Effect: Increases resistance to Break.
Maximum HP increases by 10 per rank.
Maximum MP increases by 10 per rank.
Maximum LP increases by 5 per rank.
Attack power increases by 5 per rank.
Defense increases by 5 per rank.
Speed increases by 5 per rank.
Maximum damage increases by 2 per rank.
Skill "Two Hander" turns into "Nine Hander".
Skill "Lightfall" turns into "Prismfall".
Skill "Erase" turns into "Dawn Break".
Skill "Rain Shot" turns into "Squall Shot".
Learn passive skill "Swift Arm". <CR>Effect: Increases chance of chain attacks.
Learn passive skill "Look of Wisdom". <CR>Effect: MP automatically recovers. Increases maximum MP.
Learn passive skill "Rising Potential". <CR>Effect: All stats increase proportional to level.
Learn passive skill "Reincarnation". <CR>Effect: Automatically recover from KO. No after effects from revival.
Learn passive skill "Critical Enhance". <CR>Effect: Increases damage of critical hits.
Learn passive skill "Critical Rate Up". <CR>Effect: Increases critical hit chance.
Learn passive skill "Damage Reduction". <CR>Effect: Reduces all damage taken.
Learn passive skill "Skill Enhance". <CR>Effect: Increases skill power.
Learn passive skill "Break Resistance". <CR>Effect: Increases resistance to Break.
Maximum HP increases by 10 per rank.
Maximum MP increases by 10 per rank.
Maximum LP increases by 5 per rank.
Attack power increases by 5 per rank.
Defense increases by 5 per rank.
Speed increases by 5 per rank.
Maximum damage increases by 2 per rank.
Skill "Light Edge" turns into "Holy Edge".
Skill "Brave Heart" turns into "Brave Soul".
Skill "Tri Star" turns into "Kaleid Star".
Skill "Blessing" turns into "Godspell".
Learn passive skill "Goddess Shield". <CR>Effect: Reduces all damage taken. Increases evasion rate.
Learn passive skill "Holy Blade". <CR>Effect: Increases base damage. Undead Slayer.
Learn passive skill "Bonds of Best Friends". <CR>Effect: Greatly increases stats when Sophie or Oskar have low HP.
Learn passive skill "Supreme Healer". <CR>Effect: Greatly increases effect of healing skills.
Learn passive skill "Critical Enhance". <CR>Effect: Increases damage of critical hits.
Learn passive skill "Critical Rate Up". <CR>Effect: Increases critical hit chance.
Learn passive skill "Damage Reduction". <CR>Effect: Reduces all damage taken.
Learn passive skill "Skill Enhance". <CR>Effect: Increases skill power.
Learn passive skill "Break Resistance". <CR>Effect: Increases resistance to Break.
Maximum HP increases by 10 per rank.
Maximum MP increases by 10 per rank.
Maximum LP increases by 5 per rank.
Attack power increases by 5 per rank.
Defense increases by 5 per rank.
Speed increases by 5 per rank.
Maximum damage increases by 2 per rank.
Skill "Relaxing Herb" turns into "Miracle Herb".
Skill "Spinning Shovel" turns into "Drilling Shovel".
Skill "Skyfall Shovel" turns into "Meteor Shovel".
Skill "Analyze" turns into "Oskarize".
Learn passive skill "Plant Intuition". <CR>Effect: Increases base damage. Plant Slayer.
Learn passive skill "Stamina Killer". <CR>Effect: Increases all stats proportional to maximum LP. Increases maximum LP.
Learn passive skill "Shovel Master". <CR>Effect: Increases skill power proportional to wait time. Increases maximum HP.
Learn passive skill "Bonds of Close Friends". <CR>Effect: Greatly increases stats when Sophie or Monika have low HP.
Learn passive skill "Critical Enhance". <CR>Effect: Increases damage of critical hits.
Learn passive skill "Critical Rate Up". <CR>Effect: Increases critical hit chance.
Learn passive skill "Damage Reduction". <CR>Effect: Reduces all damage taken.
Learn passive skill "Skill Enhance". <CR>Effect: Increases skill power.
Learn passive skill "Break Resistance". <CR>Effect: Increases resistance to Break.

Attack power increases by 5 per rank.
Defense increases by 5 per rank.
Speed increases by 5 per rank.
Maximum damage increases by 2 per rank.
Skill "Temple Sword" turns into "Crusader Sword".
Skill "Temple Slide" turns into "Crusader Slide".
Skill "Reinforce" turns into "Soulfire".
Skill "Grand Cross" turns into "Crusader Cross".
Learn passive skill "Grand Barrier". <CR>Effect: Increases defense.
Learn passive skill "Purify Darkness". <CR>Effect: Increases base damage. Demon Slayer.
Learn passive skill "Silent Rage". <CR>Effect: Increases critical hit damage.
Learn passive skill "Holy Sword". <CR>Effect: A portion of damage dealt restores HP.
Learn passive skill "Critical Enhance". <CR>Effect: Increases damage of critical hits.
Learn passive skill "Critical Rate Up". <CR>Effect: Increases critical hit chance.
Learn passive skill "Damage Reduction". <CR>Effect: Reduces all damage taken.
Learn passive skill "Skill Enhance". <CR>Effect: Increases skill power.
Learn passive skill "Break Resistance". <CR>Effect: Increases resistance to Break.

Defense increases by 5 per rank.
Speed increases by 5 per rank.
Maximum damage increases by 2 per rank.
Skill "Cross Cut" turns into "True Cross Cut".
Skill "Circle" turns into "True Circle".
Skill "Blade Dance" turns into "Peerless Blade Dance".
Skill "Shadow Move" turns into "Severing Shadow".
Learn passive skill "Sword Tactician". <CR>Effect: Increases damage against Broken enemies.
Learn passive skill "Gentle Forging". <CR>Effect: Reduces wait time after turns.
Learn passive skill "Divine Sword". <CR>Effect: Increases all stats (decreases each turn). Increased Break value.
Learn passive skill "Clear Serenity". <CR>Effect: Immune to turn delaying effects. Increases skill power.
Learn passive skill "Critical Enhance". <CR>Effect: Increases damage of critical hits.
Learn passive skill "Critical Rate Up". <CR>Effect: Increases critical hit chance.
Learn passive skill "Damage Reduction". <CR>Effect: Reduces all damage taken.
Learn passive skill "Skill Enhance". <CR>Effect: Increases skill power.
Learn passive skill "Break Resistance". <CR>Effect: Increases resistance to Break.

Defense increases by 5 per rank.
Speed increases by 5 per rank.
Maximum damage increases by 2 per rank.
Skill "Spirited Attack" turns into "Spirited Blow".
Skill "Meditation" turns into "Mental Concentration".
Skill "Merciless Kick" turns into "Super Galactic Kick".
Skill "Duplication Alchemy" turns into "Rapid Alchemy".
Learn passive skill "Swift Gale". <CR>Effect: Increases speed. Increases all stats proportional to speed.
Learn passive skill "Mental Sublimation". <CR>Effect: Increases skill power.
Learn passive skill "Defensive Spell". <CR>Effect: A portion of damage taken is converted to MP damage instead.
Learn passive skill "Blessing of Light and Shadow". <CR>Effect: Bestows fire and ice resistance.
Learn passive skill "Critical Enhance". <CR>Effect: Increases damage of critical hits.
Learn passive skill "Critical Rate Up". <CR>Effect: Increases critical hit chance.
Learn passive skill "Damage Reduction". <CR>Effect: Reduces all damage taken.
Learn passive skill "Skill Enhance". <CR>Effect: Increases skill power.
Learn passive skill "Break Resistance". <CR>Effect: Increases resistance to Break.

Maximum damage increases by 2 per rank.
Skill "Quick Throw" turns into "Trick Throw".
Skill "Sky Blast" turns into "Meteor Blast".
Skill "Fast Loader" turns into "Unseen Loader".
Skill "Aimed Snipe" turns into "Over Snipe".
Learn passive skill "Lightning Speed". <CR>Effect: Chance to halve wait time after turns.
Learn passive skill "Quick Shot". <CR>Effect: Reduces wait time after using skills. Increases chance of chain attacks.
Learn passive skill "High Density Shot". <CR>Effect: Increases critical hit chance.
Learn passive skill "Nihilism". <CR>Effect: Reduces chance to be affected by status ailments. Increases base damage.
Learn passive skill "Critical Enhance". <CR>Effect: Increases damage of critical hits.
Learn passive skill "Critical Rate Up". <CR>Effect: Increases critical hit chance.
Learn passive skill "Damage Reduction". <CR>Effect: Reduces all damage taken.
Learn passive skill "Skill Enhance". <CR>Effect: Increases skill power.
Learn passive skill "Break Resistance". <CR>Effect: Increases resistance to Break.

Skill "Heaven Rose" turns into "Ether Rose".
Skill "Valkyrie Raid" turns into "Valkyrie Assault".
Learn passive skill "Balancer". <CR>Effect: Stabilizes damage variation.
Learn passive skill "Phantom Dance". <CR>Effect: Increases evasion rate.
Learn passive skill "Queen Bee's Sting". <CR>Effect: Increases Break value.
Learn passive skill "Bond of Life and Spirit". <CR>Effect: Increases maximum HP. Increases maximum MP.

Learn passive skill "Damage Reduction". <CR>Effect: Reduces all damage taken.
